headline: Snap-on Incorporated to Webcast 2026 Annual Shareholder Meeting
summary: KENOSHA, Wis., April 16, 2026--Snap-on Incorporated announced that it will webcast its 2026 Annual Meeting of Shareholders on Thursday, April 30, 2026 at approximately 10:00 am CT.
